title: suessenguthiella scleranthoides
side_effects: Suessenguthiella scleranthoides can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap may cause skin irritation, including redness, itching, and blistering. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to respiratory problems, such as difficulty breathing, wheezing, and coughing. It is essential to exercise caution and consult a medical professional before using Suessenguthiella scleranthoides for any health benefits.
